post.summary: Find scan manifests matching a filter

include_deleted.description: If false and `filter.is_deleted` is not set, `is_deleted=false` is injected.

manifest_projection.description: Cannot include any of: `ewms_task`, `event_i3live_json_dict`, `event_i3live_json_dict__hash` (these can blow up memory). `"*"` is remapped to the default fields (same set).

get.summary: List all scan IDs currently on the backlog

schema.description: Body for POST /scan. Several fields have legacy aliases (marked deprecated); the server coalesces them via `_take_one_arg`. Exactly one of `event_i3live_json` or `i3_event_id` must be provided. At least one of `request_clusters` or `cluster` (deprecated alias) must be provided.

docker_tag.description: Any tag on Docker Hub (including `latest`). Must also be on CVMFS (not checked here). Cannot be empty / whitespace-only.

memory.description: DEPRECATED -- use `worker_memory_bytes`. Server will reject any truthy value.

oneOf.description: JSON-string. Must be a serialized JSON object (i.e. start with `{` and end with `}`, with optional surrounding whitespace).

event_i3live_json.description: Raw i3 event JSON (dict or JSON-string). Mutually exclusive with `i3_event_id`.

i3_event_id.description: ID of an existing i3 event. Mutually exclusive with `event_i3live_json`.

nsides.description: Nside configuration for the scan (strict dict).

debug_mode.description: DebugMode flag. Accepts a single value or a list of values. Currently `client-logs` is the only defined value; extend the enum as the `DebugMode` Python enum grows.

classifiers.description: Classifiers for the scan. STRICTER than the stored `Manifest.classifiers`: scalar values only, max 25 entries, keys and string-values max 25 chars. Cannot contain `rescan` or `origin_scan_id` sub-fields (reserved for rescan provenance).

scanner_server_env_from_user.description: Extra env-vars injected into the scanner server k8s job.

200.description: Manifest for the newly enqueued scan (possibly projected).

get.summary: Get the persisted scan-request object for a scan

200.description: The scan-request object originally used to start the scan.

post.summary: Copy a scan's request and start a new scan from it

abort_first.description: If true, abort the existing scan before starting the rescan.

replace_scan.description: If true, mark the original scan as replaced by the new scan (for REST redirect logic).

post.summary: Add more EWMS workers to an ongoing scan

cluster_location.description: Cluster identifier. Cannot be empty / whitespace-only.

schema.description: Subset of the EWMS add-workers response.

422.description: Request is well-formed but the scan is in a state that disallows the action.

get.summary: Get a scan's manifest and result

200.description: Manifest plus result (result may be empty `{}` if not yet produced).

delete.summary: Abort a scan and mark manifest/result as deleted

delete_completed_scan.description: Required to be true in order to delete a scan whose final result has already been received.

parameters.name: projection
parameters.description: Pipe-delimited list of Manifest field names to include, or '*' for all fields. Example: `?projection=scan_id|priority|classifiers`.

patch.summary: Update scan progress / event metadata / scan metadata

schema.description: All fields optional; only non-null fields are applied.

scan_metadata.description: Open-ended metadata set by the scanner. NOT nullable here (PATCH rejects null); nullable on the stored `Manifest.scan_metadata`.

get.summary: Get a scan's underlying i3 event payload

200.description: The scan's result (empty `{}` if not yet produced).

oneOf.description: Empty object when no result is available yet.

skyscan_result.description: Physics result payload (open to requestor). A falsy dict short-circuits to an empty `{}` response without persisting.

is_final.description: When true, SkyDriver will request EWMS teardown after a short delay.

200.description: Persisted result (or `{}` if skyscan_result was falsy).

ewms_deactivated.description: Type of EWMS deactivation (abort/stop/...) or null.

scan_complete.description: True when the physics is effectively done (lingering compute may still be winding down).

ewms_workforce.description: Opaque EWMS workforce-status payload. Same shape as GET /scan/{scan_id}/ewms/workforce.

get.summary: Get a scan's EWMS workflow id

workflow_id.description: Raw value from the manifest. May be `null`, the `not-yet-requested` sentinel, or an actual EWMS workflow id.

requested_ewms_workflow.description: True iff `workflow_id` is an actual EWMS workflow id (see `has_skydriver_requested_ewms_workflow()`).

post.summary: Assign a scan's EWMS workflow id

workflow_id.description: EWMS workflow id to assign. Cannot be empty / whitespace-only.

ewms_address.description: EWMS address for the workflow. Cannot be empty / whitespace-only.

get.summary: Get a scan's EWMS workforce statuses

200.description: Workforce status object (shape defined by EWMS).

schema.description: Opaque workforce-status payload returned by EWMS; shape is not owned by SkyDriver.

get.summary: Get a scan's EWMS taskforces (condor submissions)

items.description: Opaque taskforce payload returned by EWMS.

NoRedirectQuery.name: no_redirect
NoRedirectQuery.description: If true, suppresses the redirect that `@maybe_redirect_scan_id` would otherwise issue for replaced scans.

IncludeDeletedQuery.name: include_deleted
IncludeDeletedQuery.description: If true, deleted manifests/results are included.

Error400.description: Bad request (argument validation failed or request-level precondition violated).

FreeFormObject.description: Open-ended JSON object (keys and values unrestricted). Used wherever the shape is owned by an external system or the requestor.

RealOrSimulatedEvent.description: Event-type classification. `real*` values map to real events; `sim*` to simulation.

LogUrlLink.description: A `{url}` wrapper pointing at a log endpoint. The URL is nullable while the log source is unavailable.

DataSize.description: Human-friendly size string (e.g. `'1GB'`, `'512MB'`) parseable by `humanfriendly.parse_size`, or raw integer bytes.

oneOf.description: Cannot be empty / whitespace-only. Must be parseable by `humanfriendly.parse_size` (more detailed validation is performed server-side).

ManifestProjection.description: Fields to include in the returned manifest. Either `"*"` (all allowed fields) or an explicit array of field names. Omit the field entirely for the default (all fields, minus the disallowed ones on /scans/find). NOTE: under the legacy arghandler implementation, array values were silently broken (stringified via `type=str`); the OpenAPI-validated implementation is expected to accept both forms and normalize to a set server-side before the disallowed-fields check and `dict_projection`.

items.description: Field name. Cannot be empty / whitespace-only. (Pattern is intentionally permissive to allow Mongo-style dotted keys.)

RequestClusters.description: Either a dict `{cluster_location: n_workers}` OR a list of `[cluster_location, n_workers]` 2-tuples. Use the list form to request the same cluster more than once.

ScannerServerEnvFromUser.description: User-provided env-vars injected into the scanner server k8s job. Scalar values only. Limits are intentionally looser than the classifier input shape because env-var values (URLs, PATHs, tokens, etc.) routinely exceed 25 chars.

Manifest.description: The central scan data object (represents the `Manifest` dataclass from `schema.py`). All deeply nested sub-shapes (progress, event_metadata, classifiers, processing stats) live inline here; other schemas `$ref` into them via JSON pointer.

scanner_server_args.description: CLI args for the scanner server k8s job (sensitive values are obfuscated by `obfuscate_cl_args`).

ewms_workflow_id.description: EWMS workflow id. The sentinel `not-yet-requested` means SkyDriver has not yet sent the workflow request to EWMS (see `has_skydriver_requested_ewms_workflow()`).

ewms_address.description: EWMS address used to differentiate EWMS instances.

ewms_task.description: DEPRECATED -- use `ewms_workflow_id`. Was used in SkyDriver 1.x for local k8s starter/stopper.

classifiers.description: Classifiers as stored on the manifest: scalar values or lists of scalars. (Compare with the stricter input shape used in POST /scan, which disallows lists and caps strings at 25 chars.)

event_metadata.description: Encapsulates the identity of an event (nullable).

is_real_event.description: True for real events, False for simulation.

scan_metadata.description: Open-ended metadata set by the scanner (nullable).

progress.description: Houses all the progress for a scan, updated throughout scanning (nullable).

predictions.description: Open-ended predictions dict (shape defined by requestor).

replaced_by_scan_id.description: If set, this scan has been replaced -- used by REST redirects.

Result.description: Physics results for a scan (represents the `Result` dataclass). Shares `scan_id` with Manifest.

skyscan_result.description: Physics result payload; keys/values are open to requestor.

ScanBacklogEntry.description: An entry for the scan backlog used for rate-limiting (represents the `ScanBacklogEntry` dataclass). Shares `scan_id` and `priority` with Manifest.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the entry was added to the backlog (distinct from `Manifest.timestamp`).

pickled_k8s_job.description: DEPRECATED -- replaced by SkyScanK8sJob in db.

ScanRequestObj.description: Persisted scan-request object (the input used to start a scan). Returned by GET /scan-request/{scan_id}. Not a dataclass in Python; this schema is used by DB-validation tooling. Fields shared with Manifest `$ref` into Manifest.

debug_mode.description: DebugMode values (as strings -- the Python enum's `.value`).

ManifestAndResultResponse.description: Common envelope used by GET and DELETE on `/scan/{scan_id}`: the manifest plus (optionally) the persisted result.

oneOf.description: Empty object when no result is available.
